company_views.thesis: AAPL is a strong buy due to its solid fundamental metrics, positive technical indicators, and favorable macro conditions.
reasons: Revenue growth is positive and above a modest growth threshold.
Gross margin is strong.
Operating margin indicates solid operating profitability.
Net margin is healthy.
Return on equity is strong.
counterpoints: Current ratio is below 1.0, suggesting weaker short-term liquidity.
risk_flags: Litigious language appears in recent news

company_views.thesis: Amazon's strong fundamentals, technical indicators, and neutral macro and news trends support a bullish view.
reasons: Revenue growth is positive and above a modest growth threshold.
Gross margin is strong.
Net margin is healthy.
Return on equity is strong.
Return on assets is solid.
counterpoints: Industrial production growth is negative in the latest macro snapshot.
Payroll employment is contracting.
Consumer sentiment is weak.
Housing permits are weakening, pointing to softer forward activity.

company_views.thesis: Google's strong fundamentals, positive technical indicators, and neutral macro and news trends support a bullish view.
reasons: Strong return on equity and operating cash flow, combined with adequate short-term liquidity, support a bullish view.
Price is above the 20-day moving average.
The 20-day moving average is above the 50-day moving average.
The 12-day EMA is above the 26-day EMA, supporting positive momentum.
The stock has positive 20-day return momentum.
counterpoints: MACD is below its signal line, indicating weakening momentum.
The stock has negative 5-day return momentum.
Google Trends search interest is down 16% week-over-week.

company_views.thesis: ExxonMobil (XOM) presents a strong bullish case due to solid fundamental and technical factors, as well as supportive macro and news trends.
reasons: Solid return on assets, adequate short-term liquidity, and positive free and operating cash flows (FundamentalAnalyst)
Price is above the 20-day moving average, and the 20-day moving average is above the 50-day moving average (TechnicalAnalyst)
Recent company news flow is majority positive, and Google Trends search interest is up 15% week-over-week (NewsTrendsAnalyst)
The yield-curve proxy is positive, which is less recessionary than an inverted curve (MacroAnalyst)
counterpoints: Overbought risk due to RSI above 70 (TechnicalAnalyst)
Industrial production growth is negative in the latest macro snapshot (MacroAnalyst)
Payroll employment is contracting (MacroAnalyst)
Consumer sentiment is weak (MacroAnalyst)
risk_flags: Litigious language appears in recent news (NewsTrendsAnalyst)
Retail attention spike may indicate crowded positioning (NewsTrendsAnalyst)
